rationale: The cited 2002 JMRK paper directly studies long-term vs short-term price-promotion effects using dynamic decomposition (immediate/adjustment/permanent), which aligns closely with the citing paper’s stated focus on separating short-run and long-run price-war effects and doing decomposition analyses. Given this strong construct/method overlap in the notes (price effects over time, behavioral components), this is not clearly an incidental background mention.
